candidate.headline: Software Engineer | Backend, Full Stack, Cloud Systems
candidate.summary: Software engineer with 8 years of experience building product features, backend services, internal tools, and cloud-based systems. Strong fit for software engineering roles involving Python, TypeScript, React, FastAPI, PostgreSQL, testing, Docker, and pragmatic product delivery.

document.text:
Maya Chen
Software Engineer | Backend, Full Stack, Cloud Systems

Summary
Software engineer with 8 years of experience building product features, backend services, internal tools, and cloud-based systems.
Strong fit for roles involving Python, TypeScript, React, FastAPI, PostgreSQL, testing, Docker, and pragmatic product delivery.

Experience
Senior Software Engineer, Northstar Labs, London, UK, Apr 2022-present
Built customer-facing features and backend services for workflow automation products using Python, FastAPI, React, TypeScript, PostgreSQL, Docker, and AWS.

Software Engineer, Mercury Market, Remote UK, Jan 2019-Mar 2022
Delivered marketplace features across web, API, and data workflows. Owned service reliability improvements, observability dashboards, and release quality practices.

Junior Software Engineer, Atlas Fintech, Manchester, UK, Jul 2016-Dec 2018
Built REST APIs, internal admin tools, reporting workflows, and integration tests for financial operations teams.

Projects
Team Planning Dashboard: built a React and FastAPI app for roadmap planning, team capacity, and delivery status.
Async Import Orchestrator: designed provider import workflows with idempotent writes, retries, and structured run history.
Search and Matching Prototype: experimented with job matching and explainability using embeddings and candidate evidence.

Education
MSc Computer Science, University of Bristol, 2016.

evidence.title: Senior Software Engineer
evidence.description: Built customer-facing product features and backend services for workflow automation. Worked across FastAPI services, React interfaces, PostgreSQL data models, Dockerized deployments, and AWS infrastructure. Improved release reliability by adding integration tests and observability dashboards.

evidence.title: Software Engineer
evidence.description: Delivered marketplace features across web, API, and data workflows. Built TypeScript UI components, Python services, background jobs, and dashboards for operational teams. Helped improve incident response with structured logging and service-level metrics.

evidence.title: Junior Software Engineer
evidence.description: Built REST APIs, admin tools, reporting workflows, and integration tests for financial operations teams. Improved SQL query performance and collaborated closely with product managers and support teams.

evidence.title: Team Planning Dashboard
evidence.description: Built a full-stack planning dashboard for roadmap items, team capacity, and delivery status. Implemented a React front end, FastAPI backend, PostgreSQL persistence, and Docker-based local development.

evidence.title: Async Import Orchestrator
evidence.description: Designed import orchestration for provider APIs with idempotent writes, retry handling, and structured run history. The system gave operators clear visibility into partial failures and duplicate suppression.

evidence.title: Search and Matching Prototype
evidence.description: Explored job matching and explainability using embeddings, candidate evidence, and transparent scoring. This was a focused prototype rather than Maya's primary professional specialization.

evidence.title: Python
evidence.description: Core skill evidenced across backend services, APIs, data workflows, and automation projects.

evidence.title: TypeScript
evidence.description: Used for web application features, frontend state, typed UI components, and integration-heavy product work.

evidence.title: React
evidence.description: Used to build customer-facing product interfaces and internal dashboards.

evidence.title: FastAPI
evidence.description: Used for production APIs and full-stack product backends.

evidence.title: PostgreSQL
evidence.description: Used for relational data modeling, SQL performance work, reporting, and product persistence.

evidence.title: Docker
evidence.description: Used for local development, service packaging, and deployment workflows.

evidence.title: AWS
evidence.description: Used for cloud deployments, operational tooling, and resilient service architecture.

evidence.title: MSc Computer Science
evidence.description: Focused on software engineering, databases, distributed systems, and human-centered product development.

evidence.title: AWS Certified Solutions Architect - Associate
evidence.description: Validated cloud architecture fundamentals for resilient software systems.

evidence.title: Useful Product Engineering
evidence.description: Enjoys building reliable, understandable software that helps teams ship product improvements with confidence.
